download.message: Public installer downloads are disabled. Update packages remain available for ServoERP update workflows.

items: Publishes ServoERP v1.1.3.0 update package for client rollout.
Refreshes website update metadata for the client update workflow.
Fixes Materials / Procurement loading on client databases missing supplier role columns.
Adds guarded Inventory schema repair for Vendors.IsSupplier and Vendors.IsServiceVendor before supplier joins.
Publishes a client-side schema repair script for affected PCs.
Fixes update detection for client PCs that still read the ServoERP website manifest.
Normalizes Velopack package versions and app assembly versions before deciding whether an update is newer.
Publishes the GitHub Releases setup package for client rollout.
Fixes Inventory screen-action stability by guarding shared grid header sizing against WinForms click and hover crashes.
Removes duplicate Inventory delete error prompts so recoverable failures are shown once.
Publishes the GitHub Releases setup package for client update rollout.
Fixes Database Connection Setup so client PCs cannot save doubled SQL named-instance targets like PC-5\SQLEXPRESS\SQLEXPRESS.
Allows users to enter either PC-5 with SQLEXPRESS separately or PC-5\SQLEXPRESS directly while saving the correct SQL target.
Ships ServoERP v1.0.144.0 for client rollout.
Publishes the latest Release build for client update delivery.
Refreshes installer and website version metadata for ServoERP v1.0.143.0.
Adds a status dropdown in Vendor Management > Recent Vendors so vendors can be changed to Active, Pending Approval, Inactive, or Blocked from the dashboard.
Persists vendor status changes through the app lifecycle flags so active and inactive vendor visibility updates across ServoERP.
Includes the recent client lifecycle status, inventory client-PC compatibility, global input visibility, and card resize grip fixes.

versions.title: Fresh start, vendor, login, and duplicate cleanup update

items: Clears all old purchase order rows and purchase PDFs on first launch so Madhusuman Enterprises can start fresh.
Removes development/test seed data from the client database without touching real vendors or clients.
Adds inventory duplicate detection and merge cleanup from Inventory > More Actions.
Fixes Recent Vendors so imported vendors appear correctly.
Adds direct forgot-password reset without administrator intervention.
Removes viewer restrictions so all app users receive full module access.

versions.title: Purchase order PDF and card workflow update

items: Purchase Order numbers now open the stored PO PDF directly.
PO View uses a more reliable shared PDF exporter with Edge or Chrome.
Card resize locks now persist until the user unlocks the card.
Purchase Order pagination controls remain visible in narrow card layouts.
Reduced app slowdown caused by repeated global card event hooks.

versions.title: Global pagination and Clients search fix

items: Global pagination now shows active page numbers and supports first, previous, next, last, direct page entry, and page-size changes.
Clients page search now filters in place without flicker or placeholder text friction.
Contracts, Vendors, Payments, Purchases, Jobs, and Inventory now share the same pagination behavior.

versions.title: Quotation approval persistence and payment UX fix

items: Quotation Send for Approval now saves and persists the approval status immediately.
Invoice payment entry now shows a user-friendly recovery message instead of a raw technical exception.

versions.title: Purchase order payment completion and client data fix

items: Made Fully Received purchase orders payment-completed across dashboards, overdue PO lists, vendor payables, and support reports.
Updated current purchase orders to Fully Received with paid amount equal to total.
Added startup repair for old completed PO rows and smoke coverage for the payment rule.

versions.title: Client PC reliability and UI error handling

items: Fixed Clients address save refresh so client PCs no longer show the screen-action error after address entry.
Added app-wide UI error handling with typed operator messages, central logging, and inline load recovery.
Added smoke-test coverage for client address save, navigation clicks, and UI error handling safety nets.

versions.title: Global dashboard card packing and UI layout fixes

items: Added shared Tetris-style dashboard card packing so card rows automatically fill gaps.
Fixed Quotation Dashboard card gaps and KPI row spacing.
Fixed Payments Management Cash Flow Trend card sizing.

versions.title: Global UI polish and layout stability

items: Fixed global toolbar wrapping that caused large blank header areas.
Fixed page-level horizontal scrollbars and clipped dashboard layouts.
Fixed client dashboard placeholder filtering so client counts and lists stay consistent.
Polished compact alert badges and dashboard search alignment.
Added Settings > Agent Simulation with a live panel, pause/resume, one-day tick, final report, and tracked cleanup.
Added a global [AGENT SIM] status bar showing simulated day/date, document counts, and QA score.
Creates isolated [AGENT] clients, sites, vendors, inventory, quotations, jobs, invoices, payments, purchases, and PDF previews with exact-ID cleanup.
Added a global recursive text-fit policy for buttons, filter buttons, tab buttons, and TabControl headers.
Disabled button ellipsis globally and measured captions with TextRenderer so full labels are preserved.
Allowed button flow panels to grow or wrap when needed and widened fixed TabControl item sizes for long tab labels.
Fixed Employees header actions so Save, New Employee, WhatsApp, Export, Template, Forms, Import, and Delete stay visible without clipping the selected employee status.
Fixed Materials / Procurement header actions so Export, Import, Forms, and Add Item stay on one row.
Replaced fragile fixed-width header FlowLayoutPanels with stable right-side action hosts on the affected pages.
Added a global dashboard layout layer for card and panel surfaces across major ServoERP screens.
Cards can now be dragged, resized from the dotted bottom-right grip, snapped to a grid, and restored with Reset Layout.
Saved layouts persist locally per screen under the ServoERP layouts folder so user changes return on next launch.
Expanded Dispatch Center technician detection to include helpers, assistants, operators, DCS officers, and skilled field staff while excluding admin and accounts roles.
Sorted technician rosters by dispatch role priority and added visible role labels to technician cards and assignment dropdowns.
Kept live employee technicians visible even when Dispatch uses sample jobs, so the roster no longer falls back to six demo technicians.
Standardized app-wide card, panel, input, table, and secondary-action outlines on black design-system border tokens.
Patched operational outliers across Jobs, Clients, Contracts, Invoices, Payments, Quotations, Purchases, Inventory, Vendors, Employees, Payroll, Reports, Settings, and detail pages.
Added UI policy coverage to keep shared border tokens and secondary action borders black in future builds.
Captured and visually checked all 18 department/detail pages after the change, with extra full-size checks on Jobs, Purchases, Quotations, Invoices, Inventory, and Payments.
Audited delete coverage across core modules and standardized more user-facing delete actions on the guarded confirmation workflow.
Added payment deletion from payment history with invoice paid amount, balance, and status recalculation after removal.
Added inventory item delete as a soft archive using guarded StockItems.IsActive schema support so historical jobs, purchases, invoices, and movements stay preserved.
Updated client dashboard delete to use the ClientService soft-delete path and shared delete confirmation instead of an unguarded inactive update.
Fixed Jobs dashboard delete so dashboard-mode rows no longer call detail-list refresh/status controls that are not mounted.
Added null-safe Jobs selection/status guards around delete refresh paths to prevent Object reference failures after a row is removed.
Upgraded client billing address entry to a larger multiline field in the client editor and exposed it in client detail, search, and CSV export views.
Applied client registered address rendering to invoice and quotation previews while still showing optional site and site address details when selected.
Reused the existing guarded B2BClients.BillingAddress schema support; no new database column was required.
Enlarged the New Quotation editor dropdowns, input text, row spacing, and dropdown item height so client, site, validity, status, and workflow selections are easier to read and click.
Applied the same sizing to quotation line-item combo editors so item and supplier dropdowns no longer feel cramped while building quotations.
Improved inner-page guidance for Inventory, Purchases, Quotations, Payroll, Settings, Reports, WhatsApp, Support, Clients, Jobs, Contracts, and Invoices after the full user journey QA pass.
Clarified optional site/project/location behaviour across client-owned workflows so jobs, invoices, contracts, purchases, and quotations no longer look blocked when a site is not yet decided.
Added workflow guide strips and helper copy for dense forms so required fields, optional follow-up fields, and next actions are easier for Indian HVAC operators to understand.
Tightened discoverability for report tiles, WhatsApp filtering, support escalation context, and payroll salary validation without changing database schema or guarded business flows.
Added a global button alignment normalizer for repeated action areas across forms, module pages, dialogs, flow layouts, and table layouts.
Standardized grouped button height, center text alignment, padding, margins, and row alignment while preserving existing button colors and commands.
Added smoke-test coverage that fails when visible button rows in instantiated pages have mismatched top alignment or height.
Corrected the Geo Intelligence Filter/Date action-row alignment discovered by the new button alignment check.
Consolidated dashboard department cards onto the global card context-menu system to prevent duplicate right-click paths.
Added working dashboard recent-activity Copy as path and Properties actions for support and QA traceability.
Replaced Debug-only dashboard Cut and Share handlers with clipboard-safe support metadata actions.
Made global card context menus more support-ready with working Copy as path and Properties actions.
Added stable `servoerp://card/...` paths for cards so QA and support can identify the exact screen element.
Added card metadata properties for title, page, key, control type, size, and path without changing business records.
Added a global Windows-style card context menu so right-click card actions are available beyond the dashboard.
Wired global card-menu attachment through shared forms, user controls, deferred pages, and design-system cards.
Preserved guarded module delete flows by keeping global Cut, Copy, Delete, Rename, and Share actions non-destructive.
Added UI smoke coverage to verify detected module cards receive the global context-menu hook.
Expanded language switching from dashboard-only labels to a global control-tree refresh across open forms and module pages.
Added generic translation refresh for labels, buttons, group boxes, tab pages, grid headers, combo box items, menus, and tool strips.
Applied language refresh automatically to dynamically added controls in shared base forms and deferred module pages.
Added common Marathi and Hindi keys for app-wide commands, Settings, Jobs, compliance, and list-view labels.
Added Module Catalog for installed modules and extension-ready roadmap review.
Added Compliance Export Pack to generate local legal, license, module, and readiness ZIP files.
Added saved Jobs dashboard views for search, status, and type filters via UserSettings.
Added Jobs Workflow Board for Kanban-style field-service pipeline review.
Added Open Source & License Center for third-party component review and disclosure export.
Added component metadata for EPPlus, BCrypt.Net-Next, WebView2, iTextSharp, and .NET Framework.
Added Settings access for client IT, procurement, and audit review without exposing business data.
Added client-owned automated SQL backups with network, local folder, and external drive fallback.
Added BackupLog persistence and default backup preferences in UserSettings.
Added Backup & Recovery settings UI with UNC testing, schedule, retention, manual backup, status, and log review.
Added non-blocking toast notifications for background backup results.
Added scheduled end-of-day backup checks, dashboard Backup Now shortcut, and best-effort backup on app close.
Added first-launch legal agreement acceptance before ServoERP opens the main dashboard.
Embedded EULA, Privacy Policy, Data Processing Policy, and Disclaimer text directly in the app.
Added a read-only Legal Agreements viewer in Settings for later review.
Persisted LegalAccepted in UserSettings after the user accepts the agreements.
Added an English, Marathi, and Hindi language selector to the dashboard top bar.
Added persisted per-user language selection through the guarded UserSettings table.
Added LanguageManager with dashboard/navigation/common-control translations and Devanagari-capable font switching.
Wired base forms and module user controls to refresh when the selected language changes.
Added Tally Prime integration for voucher export, master import, and stock item sync through a dedicated Tally page.
Added guarded Tally mapping, export status, import batch, and sync log schema additions for clients, vendors, stock items, invoices, payments, and purchases.
Added Tally XML generation for sales, receipt, purchase, supplier payment, and stock item master payloads, with direct HTTP push or offline XML export.
Added Tally master pull/import flow to map ledgers and stock items back into ServoERP.
Added Materials-to-Purchase Request flow so a selected material can create a draft supplier request with vendor, quantity, rate, and line-item details.
Added monthly P&L Excel export in Reports with revenue, purchases, salaries, expenses, profit, and margin for the last 12 months.
Cleaned user-visible stock-risk wording across reports, jobs, quotations, and material validation to match procurement planning.
Reframed dashboard materials signals around procurement readiness with To Order and Priced Items metrics instead of warehouse stock alerts.
Updated ServoERP Assistant material prompts and context so it discusses vendor ordering plans instead of low-stock warehouse alerts.
Added renewal countdowns to contracts table, sidebar cards, and export output so expiring AMCs are visible before revenue is lost.
Added a due-age signal to the jobs dashboard table so delayed field work is visible at a glance.
Fixed installed-version reporting so Settings and support metadata read the running assembly version instead of stale config text.
Removed the Ollama local-model dependency from ServoERP Copilot.
Replaced the AI provider path with a built-in ServoERP Assistant that uses ERP context, deterministic guidance, and preview-only suggested actions.
Updated Settings and Copilot messaging so users no longer see Ollama, model, endpoint, or local-server setup instructions.
Reframed Inventory as a procurement catalog for ordering materials from vendors and suppliers.
Removed warehouse-style out-of-stock criteria, filters, badges, alerts, and export/report wording.
Replaced stock-alert language with supplier-ordering states: To Order, Vendor Linked, and Needs Vendor.
Replaced inventory valuation KPI with Priced Items so the page focuses on supplier catalog readiness.
Moved AI Copilot and Help & Support launchers into the sidebar footer area so they no longer cover module content or bottom-right actions.
Made payroll empty-month status explicit by showing the active employee count and the Run Payroll next step.
Opened invoices on the dashboard/list experience instead of landing users directly in an unsaved draft.
Kept inventory alerts on the existing low-stock and out-of-stock model without adding separate negative-stock criteria.
Added WhatsApp Hub missing-phone empty state and tooltips for icon-only chat actions.
Fixed the login password visibility icon state so hidden passwords show the crossed-eye state and visible passwords show the open-eye state.
Improved the dashboard top-bar user identity layout so the Administrator name fits without being clipped.
Aligned the installer version include with the application assembly version.

versions.title: Quotation Dashboard Polish and Login Window Fixes

items: Polished the quotation dashboard layout with compact responsive cards, cleaner resize controls, and intentional empty states after dummy quotation data removal.,Fixed login window title-bar controls and password visibility toggle so they remain visible at runtime.,Cleaned client dashboard icon fallback artifacts and verified module dashboard navigation, quotations, invoices, and page construction smoke tests.

versions.title: Startup Update Cleanup and Quotation UI Fixes

items: App startup now removes stale ServoERP/HVAC_PRO instances before opening so the newly updated build is shown.
Quotation module now opens dashboard first and New Quotation opens the existing quotation form.
Added Back to Dashboard inside the quotation editor.
Fixed quotation line-item empty message overlap and quote summary layout issues.
Fixed Company Document Templates dialog layout so the upload area, template list, mapping fields, toggles, and preview title remain visible and aligned.
Improved template list scrolling for long template names.
Preserved existing letterhead rendering behavior and client template files.
Generated invoices, quotations, purchase orders, and reports now render the uploaded default Letterhead image as the document header.
Image-based company templates no longer show the blue template label inside generated documents.
Existing client PC template files under CompanyTemplates are preserved during update.
Removed global inline input outlines that were drawing dark borders across the app.
Removed global panel resize grip rendering that was adding corner lines to panels and cards.
Preserved the app shell, sidebar, navigation, workflows, and updater behavior.

changes: Fixed startup failure on older customer databases missing licensing schema tables.
Added defensive license schema self-healing during startup and license persistence.
Prepared fresh update package for client rollout.
Updated the installer Terms and Conditions shown during setup.
Refreshed the downloadable setup installer so client installs no longer depend on a changing WebView2 web payload.

items: Publishes the latest ServoERP UI build through the in-app updater.
Improves the package updater so client installs reliably copy the downloaded app files before restart.
Includes the current support, WhatsApp Hub, icon system, and modernized page updates in the release package.
Corrected the Sign In title and improved login typography hierarchy.
Added a stronger ServoERP brand panel with readable HVAC operations value props.
Improved input alignment, focus styling, button treatment, footer context, and VM/laptop screen fit.
Redesigned the login window with a cleaner logo-free layout.
Removed heavy custom artwork from the login paint path to reduce lag in VM and remote desktop environments.
Kept the update ZIP flow compatible so this change can ship through the in-app updater.
Added central data-quality audit documentation.
Added reusable validation, business-rule, duplicate-detection, calculation-verification, import-review, audit, logging, and form-recovery foundations.
Blocked invalid client, vendor, site, inventory, quotation, PO, invoice, contract, job, and HVAC asset saves at service boundaries.
Added duplicate GSTIN hard stops for clients and vendors.
Added negative-stock protection for inventory movements and service-job part usage.
Added focused smoke tests for bad formats, duplicate detection, total mismatches, broken references, negative stock, and impossible dates.
Added Company Document Templates inside Master Data.
Added upload, recognition, mapping, preview, default selection, and module-use toggles for invoice, quotation, PO, letterhead, contract, report, and delivery templates.
Added template services for upload, recognition, mapping, storage, rendering, and central management.
Generated invoices, quotations, and purchase orders now read central default template metadata.
Added modern split-screen ServoERP login experience.
Added BCrypt password hashing for new and changed passwords.
Replaced raw-password remember-me storage with encrypted session tokens.
Added SQL session tracking, lockout handling, and login audit tables.
Redesigned Master Data as an upload, validation, mapping, and sync hub.
Added smart import cards for clients, vendors, invoices, inventory, contracts, assets, rate cards, and documents.
Added missing-data warnings, recent import status, duplicate checks, and one-click routing into ERP modules.
Added no-installer update flow using downloadable ZIP packages.
App can download, apply, and restart into the latest build after this updater is installed once.
Unlocked manual quotation number entry and fixed quotation client dropdown to use the full client list.
Prevent sample-data seeding from blocking app startup.
Protect existing client databases from demo-data reset logic.
Handle duplicate seed lookup rows without SQL Server startup error 512.
Fixed the invoice header to use the official Madhusuman Enterprises letterhead.
Corrected company GST, PAN, phone, email, and address defaults used by invoice generation.
Improved page navigation speed by keeping main modules cached.
Added background warmup for shared app data after login.
Prevented repeated theme, layout, grid, and resize handler wiring during navigation.
Added complete Inno Setup 6 installer for ServoERP.
Bundled .NET Framework 4.7.2, SQL Server Express, and WebView2 Runtime prerequisite installers.
Installer now uses official ServoERP icon and asks whether to keep business data during uninstall.
Refined modern table styling and quotation line item layout.
Improved dashboard, sidebar, settings, purchases, inventory, vendors, jobs, and invoice layouts for laptop displays.
